output:
Updated the retry in the workflow extraction boundary.

`/Users/ivintik/dev/personal/codeharness/src/lib/workflow-machine.ts` now imports the extracted constants/helpers and the `DriverHealth` / `OutputContract` types from `/Users/ivintik/dev/personal/codeharness/src/lib/workflow-compiler.ts`, so the direct `./agents/types.js` import is gone from the machine layer. In `/Users/ivintik/dev/personal/codeharness/src/lib/workflow-compiler.ts`, `handleDispatchError` is back to strict `instanceof DispatchError` handling instead of duck-typing.

The unrelated edits in `/Users/ivintik/dev/personal/codeharness/src/modules/verify/proof.ts` and `/Users/ivintik/dev/personal/codeharness/src/modules/verify/__tests__/verify-blackbox.test.ts` were restored to `HEAD`; they no longer show in `git diff`.

Validation passed with `npx vitest run src/lib/__tests__/workflow-machine.test.ts` and `npm run build`.

Changes are local. Codex did not push. Sandbox blocked `.git/index.lock` writes during restore, so reverts were applied via file-content overwrite from `git show HEAD`.
